channel.title: Kian Janloo - Blog
channel.description: Thoughts, tutorials, and insights from my development journey

item.title: Optimizing React Performance: A Practical Guide
item.description: Learn how to identify and fix performance bottlenecks in React applications using memoization, code splitting, and profiling tools.

item.title: Understanding SSR vs SSG in Next.js
item.description: A deep dive into server-side rendering and static site generation in Next.js, and when to use each approach.

item.title: Advanced TypeScript Patterns for Backend Development
item.description: Explore discriminated unions, template literals, and conditional types to build type-safe NestJS applications.
